shared_case_surface: bounded reviewed-candidate cases that keep chosen owner_hypothesis, owner_shape, nearest_wrong_target, derivative-repo exclusions, and bounded evidence specificity inspectable on the same routing surface
bounded_replacement_rule: A local repo may replace the concrete cases only if it preserves the same owner-fit question, keeps the chosen owner and nearest wrong target jointly inspectable, and still covers clearly correct routing, honest ambiguity, derivative-repo temptation, and thin-evidence pressure without collapsing the bundle into final object quality or general usefulness review.
public_safe_requirements: a bounded outside reviewer can inspect the chosen owner and nearest wrong target on the same case surface
derivative-repo boundaries remain visible without private governance context
the evidence note stays specific enough to review the owner hypothesis honestly
the public routing read stays weaker than final owner-object proof
